name: Hanzo
intro: Hanzo, the Akuma Ninja, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang , and is accompanied by Hanekage.

abilities.name: Ame No Habakiri
abilities.description: Buff Damage dealt by Hanzo's Basic Attacks and skills inflicts a stack of Dark Ninjutsu on the target, up to 5 stacks. Ninjutsu: Demon Feast can only be cast on targets with full stacks of Dark Ninjutsu .
